error_signature: infinite loop between AI Agent and chat model
context_key: AI Agent and chat model interaction
title: Infinite loop in AI Agent and chat model workflow
symptom: The workflow continuously cycles between the AI Agent and the chat model without stopping, leading to an infinite loop.
applies_when: Using AI Agent and chat model nodes
not_this_if: Workflow runs only once without looping
root_cause: The infinite loop occurs because the AI Agent and chat model are continuously passing data back and forth without a termination condition. Even if the Editfields node creates a string, the presence of items from the matrix node keeps the loop active.
fix_steps: Add a step to clean or limit the number of items before they reach the AI Agent
Ensure that the workflow has a clear exit condition to prevent looping
agent_instruction: Implement a mechanism to clean the number of items before they reach the AI Agent to avoid infinite loops.
